title: THSTI Recruitment 2026, Notification For Clinical Research Associate, Quality Manager and More Posts -

detail.title: THSTI Recruitment 2026, Notification For Clinical Research Associate, Quality Manager and More Posts -
detail.how_to_apply: Walk-in Interview Carry all original documents along with a set of self-attested photocopies, such as ID proof, educational certificate, experience certificate (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). THSTI Recruitment 2026

vacancy_details.eligibility: MBBS/BDS/BVSc with minimum 5 years experience in clinical project management OR Master’s Degree/PG Diploma/PhD in Life Sciences/Biomedical Sciences/Pharmacy/Public Health/Clinical Research with at least 5 years experience in clinical project management AND experience in clinical trial or public health project management in a recognised organisation.

Bachelor’s in Life Sciences with minimum 3 years relevant clinical trial monitoring experience OR Master’s degree/PG Diploma in Life Sciences/Pharmacy/Public Health/Healthcare with minimum 2 years relevant clinical trial monitoring experience; MBBS/BDS/BHMS/BAMS/BPT preferred.
Post Graduate Degree, including integrated PG degrees; valid GCP certificate; 2 years of experience as Clinical Research Associate/Coordinator/Site Manager.

Postgraduate degree in Life Sciences with minimum 2 years experience in clinical research OR Professional degree in MBBS/BDS/BVSc/BAMS/BHMS/BUMS/BSMS/BNYS/B.Sc. Nursing/BPT/B.Pharm with minimum 1 year experience in clinical research OR PhD in Life Sciences with experience in clinical research; GCP certification mandatory.

paragraphs: THSTI Recruitment 2026: Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI) has issued a notification for the positions of Clinical Project Manager, Clinical Research Associate, Quality Manager, and Sr. Project Associate. The recruitment drive comprises four vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and the Walk-in Interview on 10 and 11 June 2026. All relevant information regarding the THSTI Recruitment 2026 is provided below.
📌Read Also:- RR Army Hospital Delhi Cantt Recruitment 2026, Free Application Form & Apply Now
📌Read Also:- Guru Nanak Khalsa College Karnal Recruitment 2026, Notification Out, Apply Online
